title: XIMISHOP 12 Pack Artificial Glitter Berry Stem Ornaments,17inches Silver Fake Christmas Glitter shimmering Bead Twigs Sticks Picks for Christmas Tree Xmas Wreath Vase Filler Home Decor(Silver)
features: 【Value Pack】You will receive 12 Silver Christmas Berry Glitter Sticks, each bundle featuring approximately 12 branches, with 4-5 berries adorning each branch. Their ample quantity and sparkling beauty are sufficient to fill an entire vase, helping you create unique Christmas decorations.

【Suitable Dimensions】Each dazzling glitter twig measures approximately 43cm/17 inches in length, with individual berries measuring about 1cm/0.39 inches in diameter. The branches create a naturally layered appearance for enhanced realism. Adjust the branching positions to suit your preference, or freely trim and bend them to achieve your desired visual effect.

【Product Materials】These artificial shimmering berry stems are crafted from foam balls and fishing line, with stems incorporating a flexible metal wire that can be bent to any desired angle for shaping. Their surfaces are generously coated with glitter, creating a lightweight yet dazzling effect. Perfect for pairing with baubles and floral arrangements, they add a joyful festive touch to your Christmas celebrations, leaving a lasting impression on family and friends.

【Maintenance-Free】These glitter berry branches make a good choice for Christmas wreaths, floral arrangements, present boxes, Christmas wall hangings, and tree decorations. They defy the passage of time, retaining their vibrant beauty and freshness indefinitely. Whether adorning your home or presented as a gift, they offer a unique visual delight and emotional resonance.

【Versatile Uses】Our dazzling glitter picks will add a charming splash of colour to your home. They are perfect for Christmas family gatherings, weddings, bridal bouquets, DIY wreaths, anniversaries, table centrepieces, gardens and more. They will bring a rich festive atmosphere to your holiday decorations.

🩷🩷🩷Kindly note: For ease of storage and transport, we bend the branches during packaging. Upon receipt, you may straighten them by hand or flatten them using a heavy object. Please ensure you are fine with this before purchasing. When unpacking or handling the branches, some glitter may shed. This is perfectly normal and will not affect their overall visual appeal or functionality. Thank you for your understanding. Merry Christmas!
description: Product description Glitter Berry Stem Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
